stemHtml: In a "no-fault" fire detection system comprising two loops - where loop A is operational but loop B has been crushed - what will happen when loop B is tested?

options.a: Both the audio and visual fire alarms will activate, along with the testing warning light.
options.b: Only the audio fire alarms will go off, along with the testing warning light.
options.c: Both the audio and visual warnings will go off, but the testing warning light will not.
options.d: Only the testing warning light will illuminate, indicating the fault without triggering fire alarms.
